utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding fields. Now check if each is fully specified with costs and relevant details: 1) health_coverage: specifies plan name, €100/month cost, includes mental health support and other benefits — meets 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. 2) property_coverage: specifies plan name and €25/month cost, includes home/contents protections — meets 'home/contents insurance with costs'. 3) travel_coverage: specifies plan name and €55/month cost, includes travel-related protections — meets 'travel insurance with costs'. 4) additional_services: specifies two enhancement services with explicit monthly costs and coverage details — meets 'any enhancement services with costs'. 5) total_budget: provides total monthly and annual costs and timing — meets 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. All items are present and specified with costs and relevant details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific policy names. I matched each to the corresponding item names in the ground-truth ratings. For health_coverage, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' appears under primary_health_coverage.physical_health. For property_coverage, 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' appears under property_protection.home_content. For travel_coverage, 'Adventure Travel Coverage' appears under travel_enhancement_services (as an add-on with its own rating). For additional_services, it mentions 'Professional Liability Insurance' and 'Photography Equipment Insurance' which do not appear in the ground-truth list, so they cannot be mapped. Only items present in both the plan and the ratings are included.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Plan - €100/month (includes altitude sickness coverage, €50,000 international evacuation, mental health support, 24/7 support with 5% deductibles)",
    "property_coverage": "HomeFirst Standard Coverage - €25/month (smart home device coverage, personal belongings protection, temporary accommodation coverage)",
    "travel_coverage": "Adventure Travel Coverage - €55/month (high-altitude and glacier photography protection, emergency rescue services, international medical coverage)",
    "additional_services": "Professional Liability Insurance - €35/month (€1M coverage for freelance photography work, client property damage protection, legal expense coverage) + Photography Equipment Insurance - €45/month (covers up to €5,000 equipment value, worldwide coverage, theft/damage/loss protection)",
    "total_budget": "€260/month total (€3,120 annually) - represents €75/month increase from current €185/month baseline, with policy activation March 31st, 2024 and coverage start April 1st, 2024"
}
